title: the count() return null while expect 0
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2 ( id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), value FLOAT, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP );
CREATE TABLE t3 ( ref_id INT, description TEXT NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY (ref_id) REFERENCES t2(id) );
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t3 WHERE ref_id IS NULL) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t2 WHERE value IS NULL) AS total_count;
key_bug_features: count() returns null instead of zero
